title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF CURVA IN THE MUNICIPLAITY OF MEDELLIN, PROVINCE OF CEBU.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 5664 / 58 OG No. 25, 4591 (June 18, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3387, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF CURVA IN THE MUNICIPLAITY OF MEDELLIN, PROVINCE OF CEBU.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress Assembled:

SECTION 1. The sition of Curva in the Municipality in Medellin, Province of Cebu, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Curva.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
